scripts.test: bash -c 'for var in $(env | grep TF_VAR_ | cut -d"=" -f1); do name=${var#TF_VAR_}; value=${!var}; export $name="$value"; done && vitest run --pool=forks src/functions/**/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test-targets: bash -c 'for var in $(env | grep TF_VAR_ | cut -d"=" -f1); do name=${var#TF_VAR_}; value=${!var}; export $name="$value"; done && vitest run --pool=forks src/test-e2e/forgotten-passcode/*/change-passcode.test.ts'
scripts.test-e2e: bash -c 'for var in $(env | grep TF_VAR_ | cut -d"=" -f1); do name=${var#TF_VAR_}; value=${!var}; export $name="$value"; done && vitest run --pool=forks --no-file-parallelism src/test-e2e/**/*'
scripts.test-suite: bash -c 'for var in $(env | grep TF_VAR_ | cut -d"=" -f1); do name=${var#TF_VAR_}; value=${!var}; export $name="$value"; done && vitest run --pool=forks $npm_config_suite'
scripts.test-ui: bash -c 'for var in $(env | grep TF_VAR_ | cut -d"=" -f1); do name=${var#TF_VAR_}; value=${!var}; export $name="$value"; done && vitest --ui'
scripts.test-file: NODE_ENV=development bash -c 'for var in $(env | grep TF_VAR_ | cut -d"=" -f1); do name=${var#TF_VAR_}; value=${!var}; export $name="$value"; done && vitest run --pool=forks $npm_config_file'
